name: Favorite Chocolate Carmel Nut Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Melt caramels with 1/3 cup of the milk in a heavy saucepan over low heat, stirring frequently until smooth. Set aside.
3. Mix remaining milk, cake mix, and margarine or butter in a large bowl.
4. Press half of the cake mixture into the bottom of a greased baking dish.
5. Sprinkle walnuts and chocolate chips on top.
6. Press remaining cake mixture over the nuts and chips.
7. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
